title: Immersive Portal Gun
body:
A Fabric mod that provides portal gun using [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals) functionality.

![portal_gun.png](https://s2.loli.net/2023/03/19/mxdDAr76Y3RwV9B.png)

Requries [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals).

Requires [Geckolib4](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) 

Crafting Recipe:

![portal_gun_recipe.png](https://s2.loli.net/2023/03/19/qz5fNVnZCgytJUX.png)

It's based on the discontinued [Portal Gun mod by MeowMC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/portal-gun-fabric).
